testcase.name: transferApproveAndCompleteMovesStockBetweenBranches

error.message: Request processing failed: org.springframework.dao.InvalidDataAccessResourceUsageException: could not execute statement [ERROR: column "status" is of type transfer_status_enum but expression is of type character varying Hint: You will need to rewrite or cast the expression. Hibernate: insert into branches (address,code,created_at,created_by_id,name,updated_at,updated_by_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where upper(u1_0.email)=upper(?) fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select b1_0.id,b1_0.address,b1_0.code,b1_0.created_at,b1_0.created_by_id,b1_0.name,b1_0.updated_at,b1_0.updated_by_id from branches b1_0 where b1_0.id=? testcase.name: registerAndLoginFlowWorks
